title: Nutrition facts
description: Estimated nutrition for one pantry ingredient, expressed per one of the ingredient's `unit`. The nutritionist estimates and maintains these; recipe/plan nutrition is summed from them.

ingredientId.description: the ingredient these facts describe (one row per ingredient)

caloriesPerUnit.description: kcal per one `unit` of the ingredient

basisNote.description: how the estimate was derived, e.g. 'per 1g, typical olive oil'

source.description: provenance of these facts: 'estimate' (model heuristic) or a grounded id like 'usda:173410' from USDA FoodData Central; lets the UI show 'est.' vs a real source

updatedAt.description: when the estimate was last refreshed

ingredient.description: the ingredient these facts are for
